transcript: We're going to head to Thailand now and take a look at air pollution there. 10 million people were thought to have sought treatment for illnesses linked to air pollution last year. A report looked at cases like chronic conditions, lung cancer, bronchitis, asthma, heart disease. Panisa Amosha told us more from Bangkok. Air pollution has become a seasonal thing for us Thai people. So every now and again we expect that during the drought, so probably around December to about April.
